parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the phaser. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Depth: Controls the depth or intensity of the phaser.
parameters-en.Feedback: Controls how much of the processed signal feeds back into the input.
parameters-en.LFOShape: Selects the waveform shape--Sine or Square.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the modulation effect and the dry signal.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
